heading: Delete a Team
body:
**Atlascli:**Atlas CLITo delete one team from your organization using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:```sh

atlas teams delete <teamId> [options]

```To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas teams delete](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-teams-delete).**Ui:**Atlas UITo delete a team using the Atlas UI:For the team you want to delete:* Click the ellipsis (`...`) button under the Actions
  column.

* Click Delete Team.

* Confirm that you wish to proceed with team deletion.

  For users belonging to the team, deleting a team removes the
  users' project assignments granted by that team membership.
